description: Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/builder-analytics-3/phase-6.6. Agent: builder-analytics-3. Conflicting files: src/tui/views/cost_analytics.rs, src/tui/views/timeline.rs.

Auto-resolve merge (tier 2) silently drops content when branches modify overlapping files. When parallel leads create their own stubs of shared files (types.rs, errors.rs, main.rs), auto-resolve keeps incoming branch and discards main content.
resolution: Merge in dependency order (foundation first). For branches with overlapping files, extract only unique files via git show and integrate manually with a dedicated lead.

title: Phase 0 parallel decomposition and merge order
rationale: 4 parallel leads for types, config, database, CLI. Merge in dependency order (types first). When leads create stubs of shared files, use dedicated integration leads to extract unique content and adapt to authoritative types.

description: Auto-resolve merge (tier 2) consistently drops content from mod.rs when multiple branches add module declarations to the same file.
resolution: Spawn a fix-up lead after parallel merges to repair shared files (mod.rs, main.rs). Budget 1 extra lead per batch for merge fixups.

title: Phase 1 parallel decomposition
rationale: 3 parallel leads (status+costs, mail, doctor+wiring) plus 1 fix-up lead for merge artifacts. 4 leads, 4 builders, ~28min wall clock. Fix-up lead added ~6min overhead but cheaper than sequential ordering.

content: Phase 3 decomposition: 3 parallel leads for independent modules, then 1 sequential lead for integration/wiring. Single builder on final lead avoids merge conflicts on shared files.
